mapper.select: SELECT task_id, note_id, author_id, source_event_id, task_status, target_count, success_count, failed_count, last_error, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_task SET task_status = 'RUNNING', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND task_status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED')
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_task SET task_status = 'SUCCESS', success_count = #{successCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_fanout_task SET task_status = 'FAILED', last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
